The Edge of Epidemiology

The Edge of Epidemiology by Devin Teichrow

History-haunted epidemiology, live reporting, and source-first public-health tools.

Home Newsdesk Exhibits Essays Topics Historical Reference Methods Search

Histsearch

A historian-style research search tool for the next topic, not just the last one.

This public page is the web front end. For live searching, start the local Python backend on your machine, then search any new historical epidemiology topic here. The backend queries OpenAlex, Crossref, Library of Congress, Internet Archive, PubMed, and manual-history database search paths without baking the topic into the site.

Local Python backend GitHub Pages frontend No paywall bypass

Start the backend

Run this from the local histsearch project before using live search from this page:

cd "/Users/devinteichrow/Downloads/Work and Statistics/Blogs/histsearch"
./.venv/bin/histsearch serve --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8765

GitHub Pages can host this interface, but it cannot run Python connectors. The localhost backend is what makes new-topic searches adaptable.

Waiting for a query.

Results

No search yet

Start the backend and search any historical topic.
